zh.lifeSummary: 當Edward Stanley於1464年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾可諾福斯利時，他的父親Sir Richard Langton Baron Of Newton2歲，母親Lady Isabella Gerard7歲。他於1501年11月25日與Elizabeth Vaughan在英國英格蘭藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1523年4月6日在英國藍卡爾宏比 卡素享年59歲，埋葬在英國藍卡爾宏比 卡素。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edward Stanley于1464年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾可諾福斯利时，他的父亲Sir Richard Langton Baron Of Newton2岁，母亲Lady Isabella Gerard7岁。他于1501年11月25日与Elizabeth Vaughan在英国英格兰藍卡爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1523年4月6日在英国藍卡爾宏比 卡素享年59岁，埋葬在英国藍卡爾宏比 卡素。

nameMeanings.name: Stanley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Stanley, including those in Yorkshire, Staffordshire, Derbyshire, Durham, Gloucestershire, and Wiltshire, named with Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. This English name has been established in Ireland since the 13th century where it was Gaelicized as de Stainléigh.

English: possibly also a variant of Stoneley, a habitational name from Stoneley Green in Burland (Cheshire), Stoneleigh (Warwickshire), or Stonely in Kimbolton (Huntingdonshire), all named with Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
Americanized form of any of various like-sounding names in other languages, for example Polish Stanislawski , Greek Anastasiou , and Serbian Stojadinov (patronymic from the personal name Stojadin).

variants.name: Stanislawski
meanings: Polish (Stanisławski): habitational name for someone from any of various places called Stanisław, Stanisławów, or Stanisławice, named with the personal name Stanisław (see Stanislav ).

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

en.lifeSummary: When Edward Stanley was born in 1464, in Knowsley, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Richard Langton Baron Of Newton, was 2 and his mother, Lady Isabella Gerard, was 7. He married Elizabeth Vaughan on 25 November 1501, in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 7 daughters. He died on 6 April 1523, in Hornby Castle, Lancashire, England, at the age of 59, and was buried in Hornby Castle, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edward Stanley est né en 1464, à Knowsley, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Richard Langton Baron Of Newton, avait 2 ans et sa mère, Lady Isabella Gerard, avait 7 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Vaughan le 25 novembre 1501, à Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé le 6 avril 1523, à Hornby Castle, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Hornby Castle, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Edward Stanley 1464 in Knowsley, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Richard Langton Baron Of Newton 2 und seine Mutter Lady Isabella Gerard 7. Er hat am 25. November 1501 in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Vaughan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb am 6. April 1523 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Hornby Castle, Lancashire, England und wurde in Hornby Castle, Lancashire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Edward Stanley è nato il nel 1464 nel Knowsley, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Richard Langton Baron Of Newton, aveva 2 anni e il suo madre, Lady Isabella Gerard, aveva 7 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Vaughan il 25 novembre 1501, nel Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 6 aprile 1523, nel Hornby Castle, Lancashire, England, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolto a Hornby Castle, Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Edward Stanleyが1464年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアノウスリーで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Langton Baron Of Newtonは2歳，母Lady Isabella Gerardは7歳であった。1501年11月25日にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアでElizabeth Vaughanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1523年4月6日にイギリスランカシュアイアホールンビー カストルで59歳で死去し，イギリスランカシュアイアホールンビー カストルにて埋葬された。

ko.Walton Hall by Walton Le Dale, Lancashir: 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 월턴 홀 비 월턴 일 데일
ko.Knockin, Shropshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 노킨 인 오스베스트리
ko.London, London, England: 미국 미시간 주 먼로 런던 타운시프 런던
ko.lifeSummary: Edward Stanley(이)가 1464년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 노우슬리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Richard Langton Baron Of Newton(은)는 2세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Isabella Gerard(은)는 7세였다. 그는 1501년 11월 25일 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르에서 Elizabeth Vaughan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1523년 4월 6일 영국 랭카실르 호른비 카스틀에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르 호른비 카스틀에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edward Stanley nasceu em 1464, em Knowsley, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Richard Langton Baron Of Newton, tinha 2 anos e sua mãe, Lady Isabella Gerard, tinha 7 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Vaughan em 25 de novembro de 1501, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu em 6 de abril de 1523, em Hornby Castle, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em Hornby Castle, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edward Stanley родился в 1464 г. в местности ноусли, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Richard Langton Baron Of Newton было 2 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Isabella Gerard, 7. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Vaughan 25 ноября 1501 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Он умер 6 апреля 1523 г. в местности хаурнби кастл, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности хаурнби кастл, ланкашир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Edward Stanley nació en 1464, en Knowsley, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Richard Langton Baron Of Newton, tenía 2 años y su mamá, Lady Isabella Gerard, tenía 7 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Vaughan el 25 de noviembre de 1501, en Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 6 de abril de 1523, en Hornby Castle, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultado en Hornby Castle, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
